summary: Reviewed the branch diff against main and the changed files. The core schema/cache pieces are present, but the production news path still does not use the cache, so the GAP-039 idempotent extraction contract is not met.

findings.title: Production news extraction still bypasses the cache
findings.why: GAP-039's central DoD is an idempotent content-hash/model-digest cached Silver extraction pass that does not rerun unchanged articles. The real pipeline calls `news_extract.extract_batch(articles)` without a `FileSystemCache`, and `extract_batch` defaults to `NoOpCache`, so every live run will call Ollama again. `silver/run.py` has the same issue. The new tests only prove caching when a test explicitly injects a cache, not in the production path.
findings.fix: Instantiate a configurable `FileSystemCache` in `pipeline.run_pipeline`/`silver.run.run_news` and pass it into `extract_batch`; add an integration regression that runs the production path twice with mocked `generate_json` and asserts the second run makes zero LLM calls and records cache hits.

findings.title: GDELT passthrough cannot be reached from Bronze JSON flow
findings.why: `_normalize_article` returns only `article_id`, `source`, `url`, `title`, `body`, and `published_date`, dropping any `gkg_*`, `tone`, or source-country fields before `extract_batch` can choose `gdelt_passthrough_cached`. That leaves the deterministic GDELT/GKG path effectively dead for real Bronze JSON and forces LLM extraction instead, despite the GAP-039 task requiring passthrough wiring/cache behavior.
findings.fix: Preserve known GDELT/GKG fields during normalization or route GDELT payloads through a parser that carries them forward. Add a fixture test with `gkg_tone`/`gkg_themes` where `generate_json` is patched to fail and assert the persisted `NewsFeature` is produced by passthrough.

findings.title: Neutral GDELT tone values are dropped
findings.why: `gkg.get("gkg_tone") or gkg.get("tone")` treats a valid numeric tone of `0` as false and falls through to `None`, so neutral GKG tone is lost instead of producing `gkg_tone=0.0` and neutral sentiment. This is a new edge case in the passthrough path.
findings.fix: Select the field by key presence rather than truthiness, e.g. `tone_raw = gkg["gkg_tone"] if "gkg_tone" in gkg else gkg.get("tone")`, and add a test for `gkg_tone=0`.

contract_items_verified: `NewsFeature` keeps the original 15 fields first and adds the wide audit/model/GKG/embedding fields with backward-compatible defaults.
`persist.py` defines an explicit wide Arrow schema and load path that reindexes news Parquet to the wide column order.
`cache.py` provides `extract_cache_key`, `model_digest_key`, `CacheBackend`, `NoOpCache`, and `FileSystemCache` with per-digest JSON entries and manifest hit/miss accounting.
`extract_batch()` now returns `(successes, failures)` and produces typed `ExtractionFailure` objects instead of silently dropping all failure context.

Deterministic unit/integration tests were added for schema validation, explicit cache round-trip, explicit cached extraction, failure sidecar writing, and Parquet round-trip; they mock Ollama and do not require live services.

Research/progress/docs were updated: GAP-039 research note, `docs/DATA_CONTRACTS.md`, `README.md`, `docs/GAP_REGISTER.md`, `docs/TASKS.md`, `docs/index.html`, `docs/PROGRESS_LOG.md`, and `.planning/COURSEWORK_PROGRESS.md`.

AGENTS hard rules checked: Bronze source files are untouched, numeric stats merge paths are not changed, no LLM numeric-stat rewriting is introduced, and dashboard docs were updated for the pipeline-state change.
